positive: A stylized, minimalist jungle encounter at twilight. The main subject is a sleek, stylized jaguar silhouette leaping over large, abstract monstera leaves. The background features deep indigo and teal gradients suggesting a mysterious jungle canopy, dotted with luminous, glowing firefly specks. Use a graphic, ink-wash style with clean linework and high contrast. Focus on strong, geometric shapes and dynamic negative space. The overall mood is magical and adventurous. Ideal for a centered, apparel print print.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, noisy, cartoonish, photorealism, muted colors, disfigured, extra limbs
